FounderProfile.subtitle: FOUNDER PROFILE
FounderProfile.name: Chencoller Mohamed Zekry
FounderProfile.p1: Chencoller Mohamed Zekry is a former President of the Cairo Economic Court and former Head of the Cassation Prosecution in the State of Kuwait. He is the founder and head of Al Zekry Law Firm for Law, Mediation, and Arbitration — Egypt's House of Expertise.
FounderProfile.p2: With decades of distinguished judicial service, his unparalleled experience provides the firm with deep institutional knowledge, enabling precise and expedient legal strategies for individuals and corporations alike.

hero.title: A Legacy of Justice and Integrity
hero.subtitle: We believe the law is the cornerstone of a stable society. Al Zekry Law Firm — Egypt's House of Expertise — is dedicated to protecting our clients' rights with integrity and judicial precision.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide integrated, high-level legal and Sharia services for individuals and companies, leveraging deep judicial expertise to ensure a precise understanding of court procedures and rulings — protecting our clients' rights at the highest standards of professionalism and transparency.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be Egypt's most trusted legal authority — the first choice for individuals and corporations seeking rigorous, judicially-informed legal representation that expedites complex government procedures and delivers real results.

item0.title: Foundation of Al Zekry Law Firm
item0.description: Established the firm in Giza, Egypt under the leadership of Chencoller Mohamed Zekry, former President of the Cairo Economic Court, with a focus on criminal defense, corporate law, and dispute resolution.

item1.title: Expansion into International Arbitration
item1.description: Launched a specialized arbitration and mediation practice, building on Consultant Zekry's experience as Head of the Cassation Prosecution in Kuwait and his membership in the Investment Dispute Settlement Committee.

item2.title: Consumer Protection & IP Practice
item2.description: Expanded services to include a dedicated consumer protection and intellectual property practice led by Hassan Zekry, drawing on his experience at the Ministry of Trade and Industry.

item3.title: Growth & Digital Transformation
item3.description: Reached 500+ successful cases and 200+ satisfied clients, serving individuals and corporations across Egypt with integrated legal, Sharia, arbitration, and mediation services.

hero.subtitle: Our Expertise
hero.title: Areas of Expertise & Legal Recognition
hero.description: Comprehensive legal support rooted in deep judicial experience — helping individuals and corporations navigate complex court procedures and regulatory frameworks with confidence.

practiceAreas.subtitle: Practice Areas
practiceAreas.title: Comprehensive Coverage for All Legal Needs
practiceAreas.description: We provide specialized legal advisory built on decades of judicial experience — from criminal defense and corporate formation to arbitration and judgment enforcement.

criminal.title: Criminal & Misdemeanor Cases
criminal.description: Defense and representation before investigation authorities, public prosecution, and criminal courts across all Egyptian jurisdictions. Leveraging decades of judicial experience at the highest levels of Egyptian criminal courts.

civil.title: Civil Cases
civil.description: Handling civil disputes, compensation claims, tort liability, and contract enforcement. Representing clients in all Egyptian civil courts from courts of first instance through the Court of Cassation.

family.title: Personal Status & Family Law
family.description: Specialist representation in family law matters including alimony, custody, visitation, divorce, Khul', and inheritance under Egyptian personal status law — handled with legal precision and human sensitivity.

corporate.title: Company Formation & Corporate Law
corporate.description: Establishing all types of companies under Egyptian law — from LLCs and joint-stock companies to sole proprietorships and partnerships. Includes drafting partnership agreements, articles of association, and obtaining all required licenses.

consumer.title: Consumer Protection & Commercial Fraud
consumer.description: Legal representation in consumer protection disputes and commercial fraud violations before the Consumer Protection Authority (CPA) and Egyptian courts. Expertise rooted in direct experience at the CPA's Car Complaints Department.

ip.title: Intellectual Property & Trademarks
ip.description: Trademark registration, IP rights enforcement, anti-counterfeiting investigations, and protection of creative and commercial rights under Egyptian Law No. 82 of 2002 and international IP conventions.

arbitration.title: Arbitration & Dispute Resolution
arbitration.description: Legal arbitration, mediation, amicable settlements, and negotiation for commercial, civil, and investment disputes. Experience encompassing the Investment Contract Dispute Settlement Committee (Council of Ministers) and the Media Free Zone.

consult.title: Legal Consultations
consult.description: Comprehensive legal feasibility studies, case analysis, and preparation of legal memoranda and opinions. Enabling clients — individuals and companies — to understand their legal position before taking action.

recognition.subtitle: Our Track Record
recognition.title: Recognition & Milestones
recognition.description: Over 15 years of judicial-caliber legal service, recognized by Egyptian official bodies and measured in the outcomes we deliver for our clients.

m1.title: 500+ Successful Cases
m1.description: Reached a milestone of 500+ successful cases and 200+ satisfied clients, serving across Egypt with integrated legal and arbitration services.

m2.title: Arbitration Practice Expansion
m2.description: Expanded into international arbitration, leveraging Consultant Zekry's experience as former Head of the Cassation Prosecution in Kuwait.

m3.title: Foundation & Launch
m3.description: Founded by Chencoller Mohamed Zekry, former President of the Cairo Economic Court, with a commitment to judicial integrity and client-centric legal solutions.

sectors.title: Sectors We Specialize In
sectors.description: We possess deep knowledge and extensive practical experience across Egypt's key legal sectors.

consumer.title: Consumer Protection & Anti-Fraud
consumer.description: Expert legal support in consumer rights enforcement, commercial fraud investigations, and trademark protection cases.

realestate.title: Real Estate & Property
realestate.description: Legal advisory for real estate acquisitions, construction projects, property title disputes, and registration enforcement.

family.title: Family Law & Personal Status
family.description: Specialist legal advice on family law, divorce, inheritance, child custody, and personal status matters under Egyptian law.

contract.title: Contract Drafting & Enforcement
contract.description: Drafting, reviewing, and enforcing commercial, civil, and investment contracts — including judgment enforcement proceedings.

body: Al Zekry Law Firm is proud to announce that it has received an official honor from the Egyptian Lawyers Syndicate in recognition of its effective and outstanding efforts in handling complex family law cases, including custody, alimony, divorce, and personal status matters.

The firm's dedicated family law practice, led by Dr. Ahmed Mohamed Zekry, has consistently achieved results that protect the rights and dignity of clients across all stages of litigation — from initial negotiations to final court rulings.
learnings: Al Zekry's family law team specializes in divorce, Khul', custody, and alimony proceedings.
The firm represents clients in all Egyptian personal status courts and appeals courts.
Our approach combines judicial experience with a deep sensitivity to the human dimensions of family disputes.

body: Al Zekry Law Firm has been formally recognized by the Real Estate Registry Office for its pivotal role in resolving complex real estate registration disputes and property litigation cases across Egypt.

The firm's expertise in navigating Egypt's property registration framework — including title disputes, inheritance-related property division, and contract enforcement — has made it a trusted partner for both individual property owners and corporate developers.
learnings: Al Zekry handles all aspects of real estate litigation, from registry disputes to construction contract enforcement.
The firm advises on property acquisition, due diligence, and dispute resolution for developers and investors.
Recognition from official government bodies reflects the firm's standing within Egypt's legal ecosystem.

body: In a continued commitment to professional excellence and international best practices, consultants from Al Zekry Law Firm successfully completed an advanced training program in International Contract Drafting at the American University.
The training covered cross-border commercial agreements, arbitration clauses, force majeure provisions, and international enforcement of contracts under Egyptian and international law frameworks.
This investment in professional development reinforces the firm's ability to serve clients with international business interests and cross-border commercial transactions.
learnings: International contract drafting — covering CISG, ICC rules, and Egyptian Commercial Code provisions.
Arbitration clause design and enforcement strategies under New York Convention rules.
Force majeure and hardship provisions in post-pandemic commercial contracts.
Cross-border enforcement of judgments and arbitral awards in Egypt.

body: Al Zekry Law Firm is pleased to announce that key consultants have successfully obtained a Diploma in Intellectual Property Law, further strengthening the firm's capacity to handle trademark registration, IP rights enforcement, and anti-counterfeiting cases.

The diploma program, conducted through a recognized Egyptian legal education institution, covered trademark law, copyright protection, patent registration, and digital IP rights under both Egyptian and international frameworks.

Hassan Mohamed Zekry, who leads the firm's IP practice, brings expertise that spans trademark registration enforcement, anti-fraud investigations, and commercial crime defense — all now further enriched by this formal qualification.
learnings: Trademark registration procedures in Egypt under Law No. 82 of 2002.
Enforcement mechanisms for IP rights — from administrative complaints to criminal prosecution.
Digital IP challenges: protecting rights in online environments and AI-generated content.
Anti-counterfeiting investigations and coordination with Consumer Protection authorities.

body: Al Zekry Law Firm for Law, Mediation, and Arbitration is proud to host its Annual Legal Symposium in Giza, bringing together legal professionals, business executives, and government officials for a focused discussion on Egypt's evolving legal landscape.
This year's symposium will cover three core themes: the latest developments in Egyptian arbitration law, consumer protection enforcement, and the new company formation procedures under Egyptian law.
learnings: Recent reforms to Egypt's Arbitration Law No. 27 of 1994 and their practical implications.
Consumer Protection Agency (CPA) enforcement priorities and how businesses can stay compliant.
Step-by-step guide to forming companies under the Egyptian Investment Law and Companies Law.
Practical strategies for resolving commercial disputes out of court through mediation.

agenda.description: An in-depth review of recent reforms and landmark arbitral awards impacting commercial parties in Egypt.
How businesses can ensure compliance with Egypt's Consumer Protection Law and avoid regulatory penalties.
Practical guidance on forming all company types under Egyptian law, including licensing, partnerships, and JSCs.

annual-legal-symposium-2024.eventLocation: Al Zekry Law Firm – Dokki, Giza, Egypt

body: Egypt's Consumer Protection Authority (CPA) has issued new enforcement guidelines affecting businesses across retail, automotive, and digital services sectors. The changes impose stricter documentation requirements and accelerated complaint-response timelines.
Ali Mohamed Zekry, former Deputy Director of the Car Complaints Department at the CPA, breaks down what these changes mean for businesses and how to ensure full compliance.
learnings: Understanding the scope of the new consumer complaint response requirements.
How the CPA's enforcement priorities have shifted toward e-commerce and digital services.
Documentation companies must maintain to defend against consumer protection claims.
How commercial fraud investigations are initiated and how businesses can respond.

founder-al-zekry.name: Chencoller Mohamed Zekry
founder-al-zekry.quote: "Justice is the foundation of a stable society."
bio: Chencoller Mohamed Zekry is the founder and head of Al Zekry Law Firm for Law, Mediation, and Arbitration (House of Expertise – Egypt). He is a former President of the Cairo Economic Court, bringing decades of distinguished judicial service across Egypt and Kuwait to the firm.

His unparalleled judicial background provides the firm with deep institutional knowledge of court procedures and rulings, enabling precise, expedient legal strategy for clients across civil, commercial, criminal, and investment matters.
founder-al-zekry.barAdmissions: Cairo Court of Appeal, Court of Cassation, Kuwait Cassation Prosecution

journey.title: Founder & Managing Partner
journey.org: Al Zekry Law Firm for Law, Mediation & Arbitration
journey.description: Founded and leads the firm in Dokki, Giza, providing integrated legal, Sharia, arbitration, and mediation services for individuals and corporations.

journey.title: Head of Cassation Prosecution
journey.description: Served as Head of the Cassation Prosecution in the State of Kuwait, handling high-level judicial matters under Kuwaiti law.

journey.title: President – Cairo Economic Court
journey.description: Presided over the Cairo Economic Court, adjudicating complex commercial and economic disputes of national significance.

journey.title: Head of Improvement & Follow-up Committee
journey.description: Led the Improvement and Follow-up Committee at the Cairo Court of Appeal, overseeing judicial quality and procedural compliance.

journey.title: Head – Commercial & Economic Group
journey.description: Led the Commercial and Economic Group at the Cassation Prosecution, handling landmark economic cases.

journey.title: Head – Criminal, Cases & Investment Circuit
journey.description: Presided over the Criminal, Cases, and Investment circuit at the Mansoura Court of Appeal.

journey.title: President – Commercial Circuit (Arbitration Nullifications)
journey.description: Presided over the Commercial Circuit at the Cairo Court of Appeal (North Branch), exclusively handling lawsuits for the nullification of arbitration awards.

journey.title: President – Commercial & Civil Contracts Circuit
journey.description: Presided over the Commercial and Civil Contracts Circuit at the Cairo Court.

journey.title: Member – Commercial & Civil Circuit
journey.description: Delegated to the Commercial and Civil Cassation Prosecution for seven consecutive years.

journey.title: President – Bulaq al-Dakrour Misdemeanors Court
journey.description: Presided over the Bulaq al-Dakrour Partial Misdemeanors Court for two consecutive years.

journey.title: Director & Judge – Saff Prosecution & Giza Full Court
journey.description: Served as Director of the Saff Prosecution and subsequently as a Judge at the Giza Full Court.

journey.title: Public Prosecutor – Giza Full Prosecutions
journey.description: Appointed as Public Prosecutor for the Giza Full Prosecutions in March 1976.

ali-zekry.name: Ali Mohamed Zekry
bio: Ali Mohamed Zekry brings over 18 years of specialized experience in corporate law, company formation, consumer protection, and commercial fraud. He combines deep regulatory knowledge with practical advisory services for businesses of all sizes.
He previously served as Deputy Director of the Car Complaints Department at the Consumer Protection Agency (CPA), giving him unmatched insight into consumer law and enforcement mechanisms.

omar-zekry.quote: "The law must protect the innocent and hold the guilty accountable."
bio: Omar Alzekry is a distinguished legal  with advanced academic credentials in criminal law. He serves as a lawyer at the Central Administration for Legal Affairs, bringing both scholarly rigor and practical litigation experience to the firm.
His doctoral-level expertise in criminal law makes him the firm's leading authority on criminal defense, prosecution analysis, and forensic legal strategy.

hassan-zekry.name: Hassan Mohamed Zekry
hassan-zekry.quote: "Protecting rights is the cornerstone of every just society."
bio: Hassan Mohamed Zekry specializes in consumer protection, anti-fraud measures, and trademark law. He previously served as a member of the Technical Office of the Minister of Trade and Industry, giving him insider knowledge of Egypt's regulatory and commercial enforcement landscape.
His unique academic background, including a Master's in Law and an international diploma from China, reflects his commitment to a globally informed approach to legal practice.

dr-ahmed-zekry.quote: "Every dispute carries a human story that deserves to be heard."

His comprehensive litigation background across multiple branches of Egyptian law makes him a versatile and trusted advocate for clients facing complex legal challenges.

hero.subtitle: Our Foundation

v3.title: Innovation
